calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-16-2013 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Report On Status Of Administration And/Or Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-10-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Philip A. Robb for Maureen C. O'Neill.

The Court inquired about the tax issues. Mr. Robb stated that the tax issues were resolved, that the petition for final distribution was filed today, and that the petition is set for December 16, 2013. The Court ordered today's status off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-04-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Philip Robb for and with Maureen O'Neil (Administrator).

Mr. Robb stated that they have a settlement out to the Franchise Tax Board and the Internal Revenue Service, that they are awaiting a response and that they hope to have the response within the next thirty days. Status on filing of a report on status of administration and/or Petition for Final Distribution was set for September 10, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy Saxen.
